title: Notifications Module
overview: The Notifications module provides notification management functionality including listing notifications, marking as read, deleting notifications, and managing notification preferences. **Location:** `app/graphql/modules/notifications/`
error_codes: The Notifications module implements comprehensive error handling with input validation, database error handling, and response validation.
The Notifications module may raise the following errors:
Occurs when: Requested notification ID does not exist or belongs to another user
Occurs when: User lacks required permissions for the operation
Occurs when: Invalid notification ID format, invalid filter parameters, invalid pagination values, or invalid notification type/priority
**Input Validation**: Notification IDs, filters, pagination parameters, and notification types are validated before processing
**Database Errors**: All database operations include transaction rollback on failure
**User Isolation**: Users can only access their own notifications
**Error Logging**: Comprehensive error logging with context for debugging
**Input Validation**: All inputs are validated before processing
**Database Error Handling**: Database errors are handled centrally via `handle_database_exception`
NotificationRepository errors are caught and converted to appropriate GraphQL errors
NotificationService errors are caught and converted to appropriate GraphQL errors
**User Isolation**: User ownership is verified before operations
Raises NotFoundError if notification doesn't exist or doesn't belong to user
Prevents unauthorized access to other users' notifications
**Response Validation**: Service responses are validated before conversion
Conversion errors are caught and logged

code_blocks.value:
type Notification {
  id: ID!
  userId: ID!
  type: NotificationType!
  priority: NotificationPriority!
  title: String!
  message: String!
  actionUrl: String
  actionLabel: String
  read: Boolean!
  createdAt: DateTime!
  readAt: DateTime
  metadata: JSON
}

enum NotificationType {
  SYSTEM
  SECURITY
  ACTIVITY
  MARKETING
  BILLING
}

type NotificationPreferences {
  emailDigest: Boolean!
  newLeads: Boolean!
  securityAlerts: Boolean!
  marketing: Boolean!
  billingUpdates: Boolean!
  pushEnabled: Boolean!
  emailEnabled: Boolean!
}

sections.heading: MarkReadResponse
sections.prose: Response for marking notifications as read.

sections.heading: notifications

sections.prose: Get count of unread notifications for the current user. **Parameters:** None. **Returns:** `UnreadCountResponse` **Authentication:** Required **Implementation Details:** **Example Response:**

sections.heading: notificationPreferences
sections.prose: Get notification preferences for the current user. **Parameters:** None. **Returns:** `NotificationPreferences` **Authentication:** Required **Implementation Details:**

sections.heading: markNotificationAsRead
sections.prose: Mark a notification as read. **Parameters:** **Arguments:** **Returns:** `Notification` **Authentication:** Required **Validation:** **Implementation Details:**

sections.heading: markNotificationsAsRead

sections.heading: markAllNotificationsAsRead
sections.prose: Mark all notifications as read (if available). **Parameters:** None.

sections.heading: updateNotificationPreferences
sections.prose: Update notification preferences for the current user. **Parameters:** **Variables:** **Input:** `UpdateNotificationPreferencesInput!` **Returns:** `NotificationPreferences` **Authentication:** Required **Validation:** **Implementation Details:**

code_blocks.value:
input NotificationFilterInput {
  unreadOnly: Boolean
  type: NotificationType
  priority: NotificationPriority
  limit: Int
  offset: Int
}

sections.heading: MarkReadInput
sections.prose: Input for marking notifications as read.

code_blocks.value:
input UpdateNotificationPreferencesInput {
  emailDigest: Boolean
  newLeads: Boolean
  securityAlerts: Boolean
  marketing: Boolean
  billingUpdates: Boolean
  pushEnabled: Boolean
  emailEnabled: Boolean
}

sections.heading: CreateNotificationInput
sections.prose: Input for creating a notification (admin only).

code_blocks.value:
input CreateNotificationInput {
  userId: ID!
  type: NotificationType!
  priority: NotificationPriority!
  title: String!
  message: String!
  actionUrl: String
  actionLabel: String
  metadata: JSON
}
